problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: If Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations is applied to or, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
